description: Oral communication skills including verbal and nonverbal behavior in Mandarin Chinese. Useful terms and phrases for daily conversations and professional reports. Practice conversation and interacting appropriately in varying real-life situations. Not open to students with credit for E ASIAN 333 prior to Fall 2019.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: ASIALANG 202(or E ASIAN 202 prior to Fall 2019) or placement intoASIALANG 301
